settings.question: How can I track my order?
settings.answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking link by email. You can also find it under your account's order history.

settings.question: What is your return and exchange policy?
settings.answer: We offer easy returns and exchanges within 7 days of delivery, provided the shoes are unworn and in their original packaging.

settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer: Orders are typically delivered within 3–7 business days depending on your location. You'll get an estimated date at checkout.

settings.question: How can I know my size?
settings.answer: Check our Size Guide for a detailed India/UK/EURO chart and simple steps to measure your foot at home.

settings.announcement_text: FREE SHIPPING ON ALL ORDERS OVER ₹999 — SHOP ZIAK NOW
settings.title: We'd love to hear from you.
settings.subtext: Have a question, feedback, or need help with your order? Our team is here for you. Reach out and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
